name: odds-api
description: Real-time sports betting odds from 250+ bookmakers. Fetch odds, find value bets, spot arbitrage opportunities, and track dropping odds across 20+ sports.
long_description:
Connect Claude to the Odds-API.io platform for real-time sports betting data.

Fetch live and pre-match odds from 250+ bookmakers across football, basketball, tennis, baseball, ice hockey, and 15+ more sports. Compare odds, find value bets backed by sharp bookmaker consensus, discover arbitrage opportunities, and track dropping odds to see where the smart money is moving.

Includes tools for events, odds, historical data, value bets, arbitrage detection, and dropping odds.

Requires an API key from odds-api.io (free tier available).

tools.name: get_live_events
tools.description: Get currently live events with scores

tools.name: get_odds
tools.description: Get odds for an event from selected bookmakers

tools.name: get_multi_odds
tools.description: Get odds for multiple events in one call

tools.name: get_odds_movements
tools.description: Get historical odds movements for an event

tools.name: get_updated_odds
tools.description: Get recently updated odds across all events

tools.name: get_dropping_odds
tools.description: Find odds that have dropped significantly from sharp bookmakers

tools.name: get_historical_events
tools.description: Get past events for a sport and league

tools.name: get_historical_odds
tools.description: Get closing odds for a finished event

tools.name: get_value_bets
tools.description: Find value bets based on sharp bookmaker consensus

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Your Odds-API.io API key. Get one free at odds-api.io
